iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.CfnAbout:
Creates the decoder manifest associated with a model manifest. To create a decoder manifest, the following must be true:
+ Every signal decoder has a unique name.
+ Each signal decoder is associated with a network interface.
+ Each network interface has a unique ID.
+ The signal decoders are specified in the model manifest.

iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.Description.Description: (Optional) A brief description of the decoder manifest.

iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.ModelManife.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a vehicle model (model manifest) associated with the decoder manifest.

iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.Name.Description: The name of the decoder manifest.

iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.NetworkInte.Description: (Optional) A list of information about available network interfaces.

iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.SignalDecod.Description: (Optional) A list of information about signal decoders.

iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.Status.Description: (Optional) The state of the decoder manifest. If the status is `ACTIVE`, the decoder manifest can't be edited. If the status is marked `DRAFT`, you can edit the decoder manifest.

iotfleetwise.decodermanifest.Tags.Description: (Optional) Metadata that can be used to manage the decoder manifest.
